title: [circt-verilog] add error message for multiple driver targetting same bits

features.name: mixed procedural and continuous drivers to same output signal
features.description: Code should include a signal that receives both a non-blocking procedural assignment inside a clocked always block and a continuous assign statement, creating multiple conflicting drivers to the same variable

features.name: self-referential continuous assignment creating combinational loop
features.description: Code should include a continuous assign statement where a signal is assigned to itself, creating a zero-delay combinational feedback loop

features.name: non-blocking assignment to output port in clocked always block combined with self-assign
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block performing a non-blocking assignment to an output logic port, where the same output port is also driven by a continuous self-assignment, triggering the Sig2Reg promotion pass to hang or crash
